title: エモのためなら雨の中でも！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I happen to look outside the window and notice
Agnes Digital running in the rain.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Here I go! One more laaap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thirty minutes later, while I'm walking down the
hallway...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Phew, that was a good run.
choice_data_list: It must've been tough running in the rain.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you... Uehehe! Of course you'd think that, noob! Little do you know, I was out there because it was raining! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The weather forecast says it's going to rain during
my race, so I figured I should practice under the
same conditions!
choice_data_list:
You'll catch a cold if you push yourself too
hard.

You'll catch a cold if you push yourself too
hard.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The weather forecast says it's going to rain during
my race, so I figured I should practice under the
same conditions!
choice_data_list:
You'll catch a cold if you push yourself too
hard.

You'll catch a cold if you push yourself too
hard.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Tsk, tsk! I'm no hothouse flower! ♪ No rain,
beat-up tracks, or cold's gonna stop my burning
passion!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And come rain or shine, my next race is still on
dirt, so I've got nothing to lose from practicing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Guehehe! I'd sooner die than miss out on the best
moment in a race, no matter what kind of dirt
track I'm running on! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital does have a point. Training in poor
conditions makes it easier to adapt to all kinds of
situations.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: But of course! I don't ever wanna cut corners!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her gleaming eyes are full of passion. With such
an unwavering drive to win, she's an exemplary
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! I strive to capture every
glimpse of lovely perfection with my eyes no
matter how poor the conditions! ♪
choice_data_list: Uh... What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The sight of Umas running in the rain, their hearts
connected with burning emotions and their
sweaty forms splattered with mud...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Uwooooah! It's the heaviest of heavy romances,
playing out on the drenched racetrack! My
mouth's watering just thinking about it! ♪
